description: Server Message Block — file sharing, AD enumeration, credential extraction, lateral movement, relay attacks, and Kerberos ticket forging.

tools.name: NetExec (nxc) — SMB
tools.description: Swiss-army knife for SMB enumeration, credential validation, command execution, and post-exploitation.

commands.title: Null session — list shares
commands.description: Attempt anonymous/null session share enumeration.

commands.title: Guest session — list shares
commands.description: Attempt guest account share enumeration.

commands.title: Authenticate & list shares
commands.description: List accessible shares with valid credentials.

commands.title: Pass-the-Hash — list shares
commands.description: List shares using NTLM hash authentication.

commands.title: Enumerate users
commands.description: List all domain users via SAM-R or LDAP.

commands.title: Enumerate groups
commands.description: List all domain groups.

commands.title: Enumerate users via RID brute-force
commands.description: Enumerate domain users via RID cycling (works even when SAM-R is restricted).

commands.title: RID brute with custom range
commands.description: Brute-force RIDs in a custom range for large domains.

commands.title: Get password policy
commands.description: Retrieve domain password policy (lockout threshold, min length, complexity).

commands.title: Check local admin access
commands.description: Test if credentials have local administrator privileges.

commands.title: Dump SAM hashes
commands.description: Dump local SAM database hashes (requires admin).

commands.title: Dump LSA secrets
commands.description: Dump LSA secrets including cached credentials (requires admin).

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit (Domain Controller)
commands.description: Dump all domain hashes from NTDS.dit via DRSUAPI (requires DA on DC).

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit via VSS
commands.description: Dump NTDS.dit using Volume Shadow Copy (alternative to DRSUAPI).

commands.title: Spider shares — spider_plus module
commands.description: Recursively spider all accessible shares and list files with metadata.

commands.title: Spider & download all files
commands.description: Spider shares and download all discovered files.

commands.title: Spider specific share folder
commands.description: Spider a specific share for all files matching a pattern.

commands.title: Execute CMD command (-x)
commands.description: Execute a CMD command via SMB (requires admin).

commands.title: Execute PowerShell command (-X)
commands.description: Execute a PowerShell command via SMB (requires admin).

commands.title: Execute CMD with PtH
commands.description: Execute a CMD command using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: Enumerate active sessions
commands.description: List active SMB sessions on the target (see who is logged in).

commands.title: Enumerate logged-on users
commands.description: List users currently logged on to the target machine.

commands.title: Enumerate disks
commands.description: List physical disks on the target.

commands.title: Check for ZeroLogon (CVE-2020-1472)
commands.description: Check if the Domain Controller is vulnerable to ZeroLogon.

commands.title: Check for PetitPotam
commands.description: Check if the target is vulnerable to PetitPotam coercion.

commands.title: Generate relay target list
commands.description: Scan a subnet and generate a list of hosts without SMB signing (relay targets).

commands.title: Password spray — single password
commands.description: Spray a single password against a list of users.

commands.title: Password spray — multiple passwords
commands.description: Test each user with its corresponding password from the list (line-by-line pairing).

commands.title: Enumerate with Kerberos auth
commands.description: Enumerate shares using Kerberos authentication.

commands.title: Dump SAM with PtH
commands.description: Dump SAM hashes using pass-the-hash authentication.

commands.title: Dump NTDS with PtH
commands.description: Dump NTDS.dit using pass-the-hash on a Domain Controller.

tools.name: psexec.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Remote shell via SMB by uploading a service binary. Creates a Windows service, executes commands, and returns output. Highly reliable but leaves artifacts.

commands.title: Interactive shell with password
commands.description: Get a SYSTEM-level interactive shell via SMB service creation.

commands.title: Interactive shell with PtH
commands.description: Get a SYSTEM shell using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: Interactive shell with Kerberos
commands.description: Get a SYSTEM shell using Kerberos authentication (requires valid ccache).

commands.title: Execute single command
commands.description: Execute a single command via PsExec without dropping into a shell.

commands.title: Execute command with PtH
commands.description: Execute a single command using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: Shell as local admin
commands.description: Get a shell using a local administrator account.

commands.title: Shell with custom service name
commands.description: Specify a custom service name (OPSEC — avoid default 'RemComSvc' detection).

tools.name: smbexec.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Semi-interactive shell via SMB using a temporary service. Stealthier than psexec — does not drop a binary, uses cmd.exe output redirection.

commands.title: Shell with password
commands.description: Get a semi-interactive shell via SMB service.

commands.title: Shell with PtH
commands.description: Get a shell using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: Shell with Kerberos
commands.description: Get a shell using Kerberos authentication.

commands.title: Execute single command
commands.description: Execute a single command via smbexec.

commands.title: Shell as local admin
commands.description: Get a shell using a local administrator account.

commands.title: Shell with PtH as local admin
commands.description: Get a shell as local admin using pass-the-hash.

tools.name: secretsdump.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Comprehensive credential extraction — SAM, LSA, NTDS.dit (DRSUAPI and VSS methods), DCC2 cached creds, machine account hashes, and Kerberos keys.

commands.title: Dump all secrets with password
commands.description: Extract SAM, LSA, and NTDS.dit hashes using password authentication.

commands.title: Dump all secrets with PtH
commands.description: Extract all secrets using pass-the-hash.

commands.title: Dump all secrets with Kerberos
commands.description: Extract all secrets using Kerberos authentication.

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit only (DRSUAPI — default)
commands.description: Extract only NTDS.dit hashes via DRSUAPI replication (DCSync).

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit — NTLM hashes only
commands.description: Extract only NTLM hashes from NTDS.dit (smaller output, faster).

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit — single user (DCSync)
commands.description: DCSync a single user's hash from NTDS.dit.

commands.title: Dump NTDS.dit via VSS
commands.description: Extract NTDS.dit using Volume Shadow Copy instead of DRSUAPI.

commands.title: Dump SAM and LSA only (workstation)
commands.description: Extract only SAM and LSA secrets without attempting NTDS.dit.

commands.title: Parse local SAM/SYSTEM/SECURITY files
commands.description: Parse locally saved registry hives (SAM, SYSTEM, SECURITY) offline.

commands.title: Parse local NTDS.dit file
commands.description: Parse a locally saved NTDS.dit database with its SYSTEM hive.

commands.title: Dump with history (old passwords)
commands.description: Include password history hashes in the NTDS.dit dump.

commands.title: Dump with output file
commands.description: Save all extracted secrets to files (secretsdump_output.ntds, .sam, etc.).

tools.name: ntlmrelayx.py (Impacket)
tools.description: NTLM relay attack framework. Captures and relays NTLM authentication to target services (SMB, LDAP, HTTP, MSSQL) for code execution, credential extraction, or AD privilege escalation.

commands.title: Relay to SMB — dump SAM
commands.description: Relay captured NTLM auth to SMB target and dump SAM hashes.

commands.title: Relay to SMB — execute command
commands.description: Relay to SMB and execute a command on the target.

commands.title: Relay to SMB — interactive shell
commands.description: Relay to SMB and start an interactive shell (connect via nc localhost 11000).

commands.title: Relay to LDAP — escalate user
commands.description: Relay to LDAP and grant DCSync privileges to the specified user.

commands.title: Relay to LDAP — delegate access (RBCD)
commands.description: Relay to LDAP and configure resource-based constrained delegation for a new machine account.

commands.title: Relay to LDAP — add computer account
commands.description: Relay to LDAP and create a new machine account in the domain.

commands.title: Relay to LDAPS
commands.description: Relay to LDAPS (encrypted) for escalation — required when LDAP signing is enforced.

commands.title: Relay to multiple targets from file
commands.description: Relay to multiple targets listed in a file (one per line, e.g., smb://IP).

commands.title: Relay with SOCKS proxy
commands.description: Relay and keep the session alive as a SOCKS proxy (use with proxychains).

commands.title: Relay to HTTP (ADCS web enrollment)
commands.description: Relay to AD CS web enrollment to request a certificate (ESC8 attack).

commands.title: Relay to MSSQL — execute query
commands.description: Relay to MSSQL and execute a SQL query.

commands.title: Relay with IPv6 (mitm6 combo)
commands.description: Relay IPv6 WPAD auth (combine with mitm6) to LDAPS for delegation attack.

tools.name: ticketer.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Forge Kerberos tickets — Golden Tickets (krbtgt hash, domain-wide access) and Silver Tickets (service hash, single-service access).

commands.title: Forge Golden Ticket
commands.description: Create a Golden Ticket using the krbtgt NTLM hash (full domain compromise).

commands.title: Forge Golden Ticket with AES key
commands.description: Create a Golden Ticket using the krbtgt AES-256 key (stealthier, avoids RC4 detection).

commands.title: Forge Golden Ticket with extra SIDs
commands.description: Create a Golden Ticket with extra SIDs (e.g., Enterprise Admins for cross-domain access).

commands.title: Forge Silver Ticket for CIFS (SMB)
commands.description: Create a Silver Ticket for SMB access to a specific host.

commands.title: Forge Silver Ticket for HTTP (WinRM/PSRP)
commands.description: Create a Silver Ticket for WinRM/HTTP access to a specific host.

commands.title: Forge Silver Ticket for MSSQL
commands.description: Create a Silver Ticket for MSSQL access.

commands.title: Use forged ticket (export to KRB5CCNAME)
commands.description: Set the Kerberos ccache environment variable to use the forged ticket with Impacket tools.

tools.name: getarch.py (Impacket)
tools.description: Remotely determine the OS architecture (32-bit vs 64-bit) of a Windows target via RPC.

commands.title: Get OS architecture
commands.description: Determine if the target is running 32-bit or 64-bit Windows.

commands.title: Get architecture for multiple targets
commands.description: Enumerate OS architecture across a subnet.

tools.name: smbclient
tools.description: Interactive SMB client for browsing, downloading, and uploading files to network shares.

commands.title: List shares (anonymous)
commands.description: List available shares with no credentials.

commands.title: List shares (authenticated)
commands.description: List available shares with valid credentials.

commands.title: Connect to a share
commands.description: Open an interactive session on a specific share.

commands.title: Connect with null session
commands.description: Connect to a share anonymously.

commands.title: Connect with PtH
commands.description: Connect to a share using an NTLM hash.

commands.title: Download all files recursively
commands.description: Download all files from a share recursively.

commands.title: Upload a file
commands.description: Upload a local file to the remote share.

commands.title: Execute inline commands
commands.description: Run multiple SMB commands in a single non-interactive session.

tools.name: smbmap
tools.description: SMB share enumeration and file operations with permission visibility, command execution, and recursive searching.

commands.title: List shares (null session)
commands.description: Enumerate shares and permissions with null authentication.

commands.title: List shares (authenticated)
commands.description: Enumerate shares and permissions with valid credentials.

commands.title: List shares with PtH
commands.description: Enumerate shares using an NTLM hash.

commands.title: Recursive file listing
commands.description: List all files across all accessible shares recursively.

commands.title: Recursive listing of specific share
commands.description: Recursively list files in a specific share.

commands.title: Download a file
commands.description: Download a file from a specific share path.

commands.title: Upload a file
commands.description: Upload a local file to a remote share.

commands.title: Execute a command
commands.description: Execute a command on the target via SMB (requires admin).

tools.name: enum4linux-ng
tools.description: Next-generation NetBIOS/SMB enumeration — automates user, share, group, policy, and OS discovery.

commands.title: Full enumeration (anonymous)
commands.description: Run all enumeration modules with no credentials.

commands.title: Full enumeration (authenticated)
commands.description: Run all enumeration modules with valid credentials.

commands.title: Full enumeration with JSON output
commands.description: Run full enumeration and save results as JSON.

commands.title: Full enumeration with YAML output
commands.description: Run full enumeration and save results as YAML.
